title: Throwing the lance
wikitext:
[]: Throwing the lance Post by Defectron » Mon Mar 26, 2007 7:48 pm On another board, I got into a debate about the lance of longinous. I'm arguing that When Rei threw it the reason why the lance was able to travel intot he atmosphere and hit the angel is because it probably has some sort of homing mechanism in it to hit targets at a distance(maybe it's controlled by the pilots will? Except in the case of the harpies they were all piloted by dummy plugs so I'm not sure if that would work). The other guy thinks that it was all Rei and unit 00s streingth who put it into orbit and managed to hit the angel with no help from any hidden abilities of the lance. In that eva video game Reichu always mentions did it talk about how the lance worked at all? http://www.tohokingdom.com/forums/viewtopic.php?p=250879#250879

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:04 pm THE SEARCH FUNCTION IS YOUR FRIEND. BTW, officially it's " Spear of Longinus", not "Lance".

[]: Re: Throwing the lance Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:16 pm Defectron wrote: homing mechanism in it to hit targets at a distance

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:22 pm The Spear has a lot of threads already, so I'm just gonna this bitch.

chunks.content:
Article: Throwing the lance
[]: Throwing the lance Post by Defectron » Mon Mar 26, 2007 7:48 pm On another board, I got into a debate about the lance of longinous. I'm arguing that When Rei threw it the reason why the lance was able to travel intot he atmosphere and hit the angel is because it probably has some sort of homing mechanism in it to hit targets at a distance(maybe it's controlled by the pilots will? Except in the case of the harpies they were all piloted by dummy plugs so I'm not sure if that would work). The other guy thinks that it was all Rei and unit 00s streingth who put it into orbit and managed to hit the angel with no help from any hidden abilities of the lance. In that eva video game Reichu always mentions did it talk about how the lance worked at all? http://www.tohokingdom.com/forums/viewtopic.php?p=250879#250879

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:04 pm THE SEARCH FUNCTION IS YOUR FRIEND. BTW, officially it's " Spear of Longinus", not "Lance".

[]: Re: Throwing the lance Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:16 pm Defectron wrote: homing mechanism in it to hit targets at a distance

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 26, 2007 8:22 pm The Spear has a lot of threads already, so I'm just gonna this bitch.
